---
title: "Çalışma 2"
---

#install.packages("dslabs")
library(dslabs)
data <- polls_us_election_2016

my_first <- "furkan"
my_birth_year <- 1994

k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %%15 + 8

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
print(head(data,k))
} else {
print(tail(data,k))
}

cat("Toplam NA sayısı:", sum(is.na(data)), "\n")
col_na <- colSums(is.na(data))
print(head(sort(col_na, decreasing = TRUE), 8))

new_data <- data
num_cols <- sapply(new_data, is.numeric)
new_data[num_cols] <- lapply(new_data[num_cols], function(x) {
  x[is.na(x)] <- my_birth_year + k
  return(x)
})

char_cols <- sapply(new_data, function(x) is.character(x) || is.factor(x))
new_data[char_cols] <- lapply(new_data[char_cols], function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x)] <- paste0(my_first, "_", k)
  return(as.factor(x))
})

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  print(head(new_data, k))
} else {
  print(tail(new_data, k))
}

cat("Yeni veri setindeki toplam NA sayısı:", sum(is.na(new_data)), "\n")
print(anyNA(new_data))
